payload.answer: Open loop detected: the referenced article was not retrievable because the mock fetch failed with a 404 network error.

open_loops.description: Requested article could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so the article content remains unavailable.
open_loops.evidence: Input says: 'Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture. Mock fetch result: 404 network error.'
